Summarize a prior-predictive cML-NMR fit

Source: R/bayesian_diagnostics.R
prior_predictive_check.Rd

cmlnmr(prior_predictive = TRUE) samples from the prior without adding the observed likelihood. This helper compares a simple statistic of the observed outcomes with the corresponding replicated outcomes. Survival replications are event-by-observed-time indicators because the censoring process is not modeled.

Usage

prior_predictive_check(object, statistic = c("mean", "sd"), level = 0.95)

Arguments

object

A cmlnmr() fit created with prior_predictive = TRUE.

statistic

Either "mean" or "sd".

level

Central prior-predictive interval level.

Value

A data frame with observed and replicated summaries for IPD and AgD.

On this page
